Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Tharlos]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Tharlos prefers a world of constant, endless change.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — The power of Tharlos can change a person's skin.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Tharlos wants to burn everything to the ground.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Tharlos might destroy the world as an incidental byproduct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Tharlos influences Bliss's unpredictability.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Tharlos is excited by the transformation of the building caused by the Elder barrier.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Kelarac is not Tharlos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 24''' — Tharlos pursues change.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 1''' — Erin was once the border of Tharlos and Othaghor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 9''' — Ach'magut explicitly states he is not Tharlos.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — Tharlos has bones.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Tharlos is a squirming, shifting figure that blinks into a different form every second.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Tharlos is an unknown entity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Tharlos is someone whose actions Bliss compares to changing emotional states.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 17''' — Tharlos is a place associated with shifting demons.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
